name: TVS Apache RTR 160 4V
text: The TVS Apache RTR 160 4V is widely regarded as the best-handling bike in its segment. Features Ride Modes and SmartXonnect. 160cc engine offers punchy performance. Great for city traffic and occasional highway sprints.

name: TVS Apache RTR 200 4V
text: The TVS Apache RTR 200 4V is a streetfighter designed for performance. Adjustable suspension and ride modes make it unique. 197cc engine producing 20.8 PS. Ideal for enthusiasts who want track-level handling.

name: TVS Raider 125
text: The TVS Raider 125 is the most stylish 125cc bike in India. Features a TFT display and distinct LED headlight. Best-in-class mileage of 67 kmpl makes it perfect for students and daily riders who want style on a budget.

name: TVS Ronin
text: TVS Ronin is a 'modern-retro' scrambler. Its 225cc engine is tuned for high torque and relaxed cruising. Comfortable upright posture, golden USD forks, and off-road capability make it a versatile lifestyle bike.

name: TVS Jupiter 125
text: TVS Jupiter 125 offers the largest under-seat storage in the segment (can fit two helmets). Extremely practical family scooter with a smooth 124cc engine and comfortable long seat.

name: TVS Ntorq 125 Race XP
text: TVS Ntorq 125 is India's sportiest scooter. The Race XP variant has 10 PS power and voice commands. Features stealthy looks and Bluetooth connectivity. Best for young riders who want a fast scooter.

name: Bajaj Pulsar N160
text: The Bajaj Pulsar N160 is a refined streetfighter with Dual Channel ABS (segment first). Its 164cc oil-cooled engine is incredibly smooth. Offers a big-bike feel with aggressive tank extensions.

name: Bajaj Pulsar NS200
text: The Bajaj Pulsar NS200 is a legendary streetfighter built for thrill. Its 199cc liquid-cooled engine delivers raw power (24.5 PS). Known for its muscular design and raw acceleration. Best for highway blasts and aggressive city riding.

name: Bajaj Dominar 400
text: Bajaj Dominar 400 is India's favorite power cruiser. The 373cc engine (derived from KTM) makes it a highway beast. Comes with touring accessories stock. Heavy and stable at high speeds.

name: Bajaj Platina 110 ABS
text: Bajaj Platina 110 is the only commuter with ABS for safety. Extremely comfortable suspension ('Comfortec') and huge mileage of 70+ kmpl make it the smartest choice for daily office commute.

name: Yamaha MT-15 V2
text: The Yamaha MT-15 V2 is a hyper-naked sport bike. Features the legendary R15 engine, USD forks, and Traction Control. Extremely agile, lightweight, and aggressive. A head-turner on city streets.

name: Yamaha R15 V4
text: The Yamaha R15 V4 is a track machine for the road. Aerodynamic fairing, Quick Shifter, and VVA technology make it the most advanced 155cc bike. Committed riding posture for pure sport enthusiasts.

name: Yamaha FZ-S FI V4
text: Yamaha FZ-S V4 is the Lord of the Streets. Reliable 149cc engine known for refinement. Now comes with Traction Control. Broad tyres and muscular tank make it looked bigger than it is.

name: Yamaha Ray ZR 125
text: Yamaha Ray ZR 125 is a lightweight, rugged sporty scooter (Hybrid assist). Weighs just 99kg which makes it super zippy. Unique design appeals to youth.

name: Yamaha Aerox 155
text: Yamaha Aerox 155 is a maxi-sports scooter with the R15 engine. Liquid-cooled, fast, and stable. Has huge underseat storage and big 14-inch wheels. The closest a scooter gets to a sportbike.

name: Hero Splendor Plus XTEC
text: Hero Splendor Plus is India's best-selling bike. The XTEC version adds a digital meter with Bluetooth. Bulletproof reliability, low maintenance, and high resale value. The ultimate utility vehicle.

name: Hero Xpulse 200 4V
text: Hero Xpulse 200 4V is India's most affordable true adventure bike. Long travel suspension, 21-inch front wheel, and rally kit options. Built to conquer no-road conditions and mountains.

name: Hero Karizma XMR
text: The Legend Returns. Hero Karizma XMR features a 210cc liquid-cooled engine (25.5 PS). Sharp styling, adjustable windshield, and sporty ergonomics. A fast sports tourer.

name: Hero Xtreme 125R
text: Hero Xtreme 125R is a stylish commuter that looks like a 160cc bike. Sprint 0-60 in 5.9s yet delivers 66 kmpl mileage. Features single-channel ABS and full LED lighting.

name: Honda Shine 125
text: Honda Shine 125 is the king of the 125cc segment. Extremely refined silent engine. 5-speed gearbox for smooth cruising. Reliability and resale value are unmatched.

name: Honda SP 125
text: Honda SP 125 is a premium modern commuter. Fully digital meter, gear position indicator, and LED headlamp. Lightweight and efficient (65 kmpl), making it a favorite for office goers.

name: Honda Unicorn
text: Honda Unicorn is the benchmark for comfort. Its 162cc engine is buttery smooth with great torque. Soft suspension and long seat make it the most comfortable bike for bad roads and families.

name: Honda Hornet 2.0
text: Honda Hornet 2.0 is an agile streetfighter. Features Golden USD forks (premium look) and a 184cc engine. Handling is sharp and precise. Good for young riders.

name: Honda CB200X
text: Honda CB200X is a 'Urban Explorer'. Derived from Hornet 2.0 but with tall visor and upright posture. Good for light touring and city use with adventure styling.

name: Honda H'ness CB350
text: Honda H'ness CB350 challenges Royal Enfield. 350cc engine has a distinct thump but zero vibration. Features Traction Control (HSTC) and Bluetooth. Premium build quality.

name: Suzuki Access 125
text: Suzuki Access 125 is India's most loved 125cc scooter. Retro styling with a peppy engine. Great blend of power and practicality for families.

name: Suzuki Burgman Street
text: Suzuki Burgman Street is a maxi-style scooter. Offers a relaxed riding position with footrests. 124cc engine is smooth. Huge presence on the road.

name: Suzuki Gixxer SF 250
text: Suzuki Gixxer SF 250 is an underrated gem. Unique Oil-Cooled (SOCS) 250cc engine is incredibly reliable and smooth. Sport touring ergonomics make it great for long distances.

name: Suzuki V-Strom SX
text: Suzuki V-Strom SX is a versatile sports adventure tourer. 250cc oil-cooled engine. 19-inch front wheel and tall stance make it great for highways and bad roads.

name: TVS Sport
text: TVS Sport is the mileage champion of India (Record holder). Simple, basic, and extremely durable. 110cc engine delivers 75+ kmpl in real world.

name: Hero Passion XTEC
text: Hero Passion XTEC is a stylish 110cc commuter. Features Projector LED Headlamp (segment first) and digital console. A step up from Splendor in terms of style.

name: Honda Activa 6G H-Smart
text: Honda Activa is India's scooter. The H-Smart variant comes with Keyless Entry (Smart Key). Metal body, reliable engine, and high resale value.

name: Honda Dio 125
text: Honda Dio 125 is the sporty version of Activa. Aggressive design features a muffler and graphics. Popular among college students.

name: Bajaj CT 110X
text: Bajaj CT 110X is a 'Kadak' commuter. Built like a tank with extra guards and carriers. Designed for rural roads and heavy loads. Indestructible.

name: Bajaj Avenger Cruise 220
text: Bajaj Avenger 220 is the most affordable cruiser. Low seat height, swept-back handlebars, and windscreen provide a classic American cruiser feel.

name: Hero Destini 125 XTEC
text: Hero Destini 125 is a value-for-money family scooter. Metal body and simplistic design. XTEC version adds Bluetooth and LED lamps.

name: TVS Radeon
text: TVS Radeon is a stylish commuter with chrome accents. Offers a soft cushion seat. Known for its distinct exhaust sound and sturdy build.

name: TVS iQube S
text: TVS iQube S is a premium Electric Scooter. 100km real range. Silent, smooth, and feature-rich TFT dashboard. Great build quality.
